prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLX-MINIGARDENSET-3PC Product Type: GARDEN_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 3pc Mini Wooden Handheld Gardening Tool Set (7 Inches) Description: If you have an outdoor living space with lots of plant pots, flower pots, perhaps a herb garden or succulent planters, this Three-Piece Mini Wooden Gardening Tool Set is perfect for maintaining those types of smaller aforementioned gardening projects. With easy-to-use, small wooden handles, the mini garden tools allow you to work in smaller pots or planters with less surface area than a regular outdoor garden. This set is also great for kids who want to give their green thumb a try at gardening too.

The three-piece garden tools set includes a mini garden shovel, a mini garden spade, and a mini garden rake. Use the mini garden shovel for digging, planting, or transplanting plants, flowers, soil, or succulents. The mini garden spade is great for digging, loosening ground, or to break up lumps of soil in your pot planter or flower planter; the spade is also useful for reshaping small garden beds or plots. Lastly, the mini garden rake can be used to remove garden debris, as well as to level and grade soil before plants, flowers, herbs, seeds, or succulents are planted in your garden plot, bed or pot.

Small, ergonomic, lightweight, and economical, this three-piece mini wooden gardening toolset can help make any plant pot, flower pot, succulent planter, or herb garden look and perform its best. Search Terms: Garden tool set; garden tools; gardening hand tools; succulent pots; container gardening; hand trowel; cultivator; yard rake; herb garden; apartment essentials; potting bench; indoor plants; gardening gifts; housewarming gifts new home; planting pots Features: - MINI GARDEN TOOL SET: This mini wooden garden tool set is great for tackling gardening projects with a smaller surface area like succulent planters, a herb garden or a plant pot or flower pot; the tool set includes a mini garden shovel, a mini garden rake and a mini garden spade useful for everyday gardening, gardening beginners, a smaller patio garden and is great for kids too - MINI GARDEN SHOVEL: This mini garden shovel is lightweight and perfect for gardening when you have to dig holes for new plants, for removing small, pesky weeds or for transplanting small plants, flowers, succulents or herbs - MINI GARDEN SPADE: The mini garden spade is easy to handle and used to dig, loosen ground or to break up lumps of soil in your pot planter or flower planter; the mini garden spade is also useful for reshaping small garden beds or plots - MINI GARDEN RAKE: This mini wooden garden rake is a gardening essential used to remove garden debris, as well as to level and grade your garden soil before plants or seed are planted in your garden, herb garden, flower pot or plant pot - SPECIFICATIONS: Sold as a set of three; Set includes garden rake, spade, shovel; Country of Origin: China: Handle Material: Wood; Tool Material: Dimensions: 7.5" Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 3-pc Mini Wooden Garden Tool Set 7 Inches

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 3-pk 7 in Mini Wooden Gardening Tool Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Includes Shovel, Spade And Rake, Ideal For Succulents And Potted Plants, Lightweight Ergonomic Design, Perfect For Kids And Beginners

openai.title_differentiation: Mini Shovel Spade Rake, Wooden Handles, 75-Inch Compact Size, Great For Succulents, Herbs, Pots, Kids
